note: Tate Modern exhibitions/commissions. Hand-maintained capture fixture (tate.org.uk resists the project's scripted fetch). Refresh each season from tate.org.uk/visit/tate-modern. Future-opening only; the loader drops events whose opening has passed.

items.title: Frida: The Making of an Icon
items.description: Frida Kahlo as artist, political figure, feminist icon, and global image

items.title: Ana Mendieta
items.description: First major UK exhibition in over a decade — films, paintings, sculpture, and work previously unseen in the UK

items.title: Tarek Atoui
items.description: Hyundai Commission · Turbine Hall · site-specific work by the Lebanese-French artist and composer

items.title: Light and Magic: The Birth of Art Photography
items.description: Pictorialism and early art photography, with artists from several continents
